---
name: New app rule
about: Request or submit a rule for a new app
title: 'App rule: '
labels: app-rule
---

**App name:**

**Bundle ID:**
Run `osascript -e 'id of app "AppName"'` to find it.

**Which zones should be blocked?**
Describe which parts of the app contain private info (sidebar, header, notifications, etc.)

**Which zones should be allowed?**
Describe which parts the AI needs to see to be useful.
